base: v14 UI/data with v6 playback kernel restored
comparison_summary: v5/v6 used command objects {t,l,label}; later versions used {display,speech,lang}. v18 restores {t,l,label}.
v5/v6 called say(p.t,p.l,...) directly; v18 restores that direct call.
v5/v6 used new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text) with fa-AF; v18 restores that exact path.
v15-v17 introduced mobile hold/retry/alternate callback logic; v18 removes it.
v18 keeps later UI, version marker, initiative line, Edge fit, and verb-only synonyms.
